claim_tested: The frozen TEMPO 0.1.0 baseline had a clean-clone passing suite and host-matrix CI before the newly reproduced boundary cases were added.
limitations: A passing existing suite does not cover the newly reproduced missing-start and split-state cases
The linked CI result is inspectable but not a signed platform attestation
This evidence argues for regression caution, not for leaving the defects unfixed

provenance.collection_method: Read the immutable release-candidate facts recorded in governance/feature-freeze.json

sample_context.description: The checked-in feature-freeze record for the 0.1.0 release candidate.
